function.name: bookAppointment
function.description: Books an appointment once the caller has confirmed a specific date and time. Creates a calendar event and logs the booking to the dashboard. Always confirm the date and time (and address, if relevant) back to the caller before calling this.

phone.description: Caller's callback phone number, including area code

service.description: What the appointment is for, phrased naturally for this business, e.g. 'AC not cooling - diagnostic', 'Teeth cleaning', 'Haircut and color', 'Dinner reservation for 4'

address.description: Service address — only include this if the business goes to the customer (e.g. home services, mobile repair). Omit for businesses the customer visits.

duration_minutes.description: Expected length of the appointment in minutes. Pick something appropriate for the service (e.g. 30 for a quick visit, 60 for a standard appointment, 90-120 for an in-home service call). Defaults to 60 if not specified.

notes.description: Any additional details the caller mentioned
